steps.title: Identify the decisive contrast
steps.content: The passage shows that resin is effective but slow due to long curing time, while plastic sheets match resin's utility as a stabilizer while allowing near-instantaneous embedding. The key signal is this speed advantage paired with maintained quality.

steps.title: Match the advantage to what's enhanced
steps.content:
Choice B states that plastic can enhance the efficiency of preparatory steps before sectioning a hair without compromising the hair's cross-sectional shape. Choices A and D frame the outcome as maintaining established qualities rather than introducing an improvement, while C contradicts the passage about the role of a stabilizing agent.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
